code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(string.trim(line1))

  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n > t
      if first
        result = "#{n}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{n}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
